_note: This file is rewritten in place by fetch.py on each run. The keys below document the schema; values become real after you pin source URLs in fetch.py and run it locally. WAVs are gitignored; this manifest, the .txt truth files, the README, and fetch.py are committed.

en-clean-30s.description: Clean English speech, solo reader, ~30 s; ground truth in en-clean-30s.txt.

fr-clean-30s.description: Clean French speech, solo reader, ~30 s; ground truth in fr-clean-30s.txt.

vocab-biasing-clip.description: ~10 s recording of you saying at least one term from tests/fixtures/vocab/glossary.txt.
